context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements EU VAT logic including B2B reverse charge with VIES validation, correct fallback to B2C when VAT number is invalid, proper EU country detection, and awareness of OSS/IOSS thresholds and economic nexus rules.

checklist.name: EU country list used
checklist.description: Code includes a list of EU country codes (at minimum: AT, BE, DE, FR, IT, ES, NL, PL, SE) used to determine if the destination is within the EU

checklist.name: B2B cross-border reverse charge
checklist.description: When buyer provides a VAT number AND the destination country differs from the seller's country, reverse charge logic is applied (totalVAT = 0, vatType = 'reverse_charge' or equivalent)

checklist.name: VIES validation before reverse charge
checklist.description: VAT number is validated via an external API call BEFORE applying reverse charge — reverse charge is NOT applied without validation

checklist.name: VIES REST API URL
checklist.description: VIES validation uses the EC REST endpoint (ec.europa.eu/taxation_customs/vies/rest-api/ms/...) not a SOAP endpoint or third-party library

checklist.name: Invalid VAT falls back to B2C
checklist.description: If VIES returns isValid=false (or the call fails), the code does NOT apply reverse charge but instead charges VAT at the destination country rate (B2C path)

checklist.name: VAT rate by destination country
checklist.description: B2C VAT is charged at the destination country's rate (not a single flat rate for all EU countries)

checklist.name: No VAT outside EU
checklist.description: Orders shipping to non-EU countries return zero VAT (vatType = 'none' or equivalent), not a default rate

checklist.name: OSS/IOSS threshold documented
checklist.description: Code or comments mention the €10,000/year EU sales threshold above which OSS/IOSS registration is required for non-EU sellers

checklist.name: US nexus thresholds documented
checklist.description: Code or comments include the economic nexus thresholds ($100,000/year OR 200 transactions/year for most US states)

checklist.name: Real-time display emphasized
checklist.description: Integration notes or comments specify that tax must be calculated and displayed before the customer confirms payment (not deferred to post-payment)

checklist.name: No hardcoded rates as primary
checklist.description: Does NOT use hardcoded VAT rates as the sole authoritative source — either calls a tax API or clearly documents rates as a simplified local fallback with a comment to use a maintained database in production

checklist.name: Validated VAT number returned
checklist.description: When reverse charge applies, the validated VAT number is included in the return value (for audit/display purposes)
